description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a combination of wood and dark panel exterior finishes, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The structure is single-story and includes large floor-to-ceiling windows at the front, allowing for ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with green lawns and several mature trees. A spacious driveway leads to an integrated garage, while a rectangular swimming pool is situated in the backyard. The layout is open and geometric, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes outdoor living, with patios and open spaces seamlessly connecting the interior and exterior.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wood and dark panel exterior, large windows, integrated garage, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, two trees, and the pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the flat roof, wooden deck, garage entrance, and driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, green lawn, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Backyard view with the pool, patio area, and a tree, emphasizing outdoor living space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and minimal rear openings
